meta.description: Database of common errors that occur during agent-generated code and their fixes. Organized by category: runtime, build, styling, architecture, and MSM Portal-specific.

errors.error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getFieldProps')
errors.cause: Form input component used outside Formik context
errors.detection: Any MCForm* component rendered without an ancestor <Formik> wrapper
errors.fix: Wrap form inputs in <Formik initialValues={...} validationSchema={...} onSubmit={...}><Form>...</Form></Formik>. See patterns.json -> form-basic.
errors.fix_code:
<Formik initialValues={{ name: '' }} validationSchema={schema} onSubmit={handleSubmit}>
  {({ isSubmitting }) => (
    <Form>
      <MCFormTextInput name="name" fieldLabel="Name" />
    </Form>
  )}
</Formik>

errors.error: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component repeatedly calls setState inside componentWillUpdate or componentDidUpdate.
errors.cause: State update triggers re-render which triggers another state update in an infinite loop
common_scenarios: Mock API returning new object reference on every call, causing useEffect dependency to constantly change
useEffect without proper dependency array or with unstable dependencies
Formik setFieldValue called during render instead of inside a handler or useEffect
Passing inline object/array literals as props to memoized components
useState initializer function called conditionally or re-created each render
errors.fix: Stabilize object references with useMemo/useCallback, add correct dependency arrays to useEffect, ensure setFieldValue is called in event handlers not during render.
fix_strategies: Wrap object creation in useMemo to prevent new references
Use useCallback for handler functions passed as dependencies
For mock APIs: use useMemo to stabilize return values or useRef to cache
Check useEffect dependency arrays — remove unstable references or memoize them

errors.error: React Hook "useXxx" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render.
errors.cause: Hook called inside a condition, loop, or after an early return
errors.detection: Regex: if\s*\(.*\)\s*\{[^}]*use[A-Z]
errors.fix: Move all hooks to the top level of the component function, before any conditional returns. If you need conditional logic, call the hook unconditionally and use the result conditionally.

errors.error: Warning: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop.
errors.cause: Array.map() rendered without key prop on each element
errors.fix: Add a unique key prop to each element in the mapped array. Use a stable identifier (id, not array index) when possible.

errors.error: Warning: React does not recognize the `isActive` prop on a DOM element.
errors.cause: Custom prop forwarded to DOM element through styled-components without $ prefix
errors.detection: Styled component receives a prop that is not a valid HTML attribute and does not use $ prefix
errors.fix: Prefix non-HTML props with $ in both the styled component definition and JSX usage.

errors.error: Hardcoded hex color found in styled-component or JSX
errors.cause: Using hex values like #346bea or #ffffff directly instead of theme tokens
errors.detection: Regex: #([0-9A-Fa-f]{3,8})\b in *.tsx/*.ts files (excluding tokens.json, tests)
errors.fix: Replace hex value with the corresponding theme.mcui.palette.* token. See semantic-palette.json -> quickLookup for hex-to-token mapping.

errors.error: Hardcoded pixel spacing found in styled-component
errors.cause: Using direct px values like padding: 16px instead of theme.mcui.spacing(2)
errors.detection: Regex: (padding|margin|gap):\s*\d+px
errors.fix: Replace px values with theme.mcui.spacing(n) where n = px / 8. Allowed values: 0.5=4px, 1=8px, 1.5=12px, 2=16px, 3=24px, 4=32px, 5=40px, 6=48px, 8=64px.

errors.error: Hardcoded font-size found in styled-component
errors.cause: Using direct font-size like font-size: 14px instead of theme.mcui.typography.BODY_1_BODY.size
errors.detection: Regex: font-size:\s*\d+(px|rem|em)
common_mistakes: font-size: 14px -> should be props.theme.mcui.typography.BODY_1_BODY.size (or H_5.size if bold)
errors.fix: Replace px values with the corresponding theme.mcui.typography.*.size token.

errors.error: Inline style found in JSX (style={{...}})
errors.cause: Using React inline styles instead of styled-components
errors.detection: Regex: style=\{\{
errors.fix: Replace with a styled-component using SC prefix. All styles must go through styled-components for theme access and consistency.

errors.error: Styled component missing SC prefix
errors.cause: Styled component declared without the required SC prefix in its name
errors.detection: Regex: ^const [A-Z][a-zA-Z]+ = styled\. (where name does not start with SC)
errors.fix: Rename to SC* prefix. Example: const Wrapper = styled.div -> const SCWrapper = styled.div

errors.error: Hardcoded user-facing string found in JSX
errors.cause: Using literal English strings instead of i18n translation keys
errors.detection: Regex: >\s*[A-Z][a-zA-Z\s]{2,}\s*< in JSX sections
errors.fix: Replace with {t('key.path')} using useTranslation. Namespace follows convention: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms.

errors.error: Page component contains hooks or business logic
errors.cause: Page file contains useState, useEffect, useQuery, useNavigate, useTranslation, or other hooks instead of being a thin wrapper
errors.detection: Regex: useState|useEffect|useQuery|useNavigate|useTranslation|useEntityParam|useMemo|useCallback in Page file
errors.fix: Page files must only import and render a Container. Move all hooks, logic, and data fetching to the Container file.

errors.error: Component contains data fetching or navigation hooks
errors.cause: Component file (pure UI layer) contains tRPC calls, msmAPI queries, useNavigate, useTranslation, or useEntityParam
errors.detection: Regex: trpc\.|msmAPI\.|useNavigate|useTranslation|useInAppAlert|useEntityParam in Component file
errors.fix: Move data fetching and hooks from Component to Container. Component should only receive data via typed props (MT* interface).

errors.error: Container does not handle loading state
errors.cause: Data-fetching container renders component immediately without checking isFetching/isLoading
errors.detection: Container has useQuery/tRPC call but no MCCircularLoader or MCLoader usage
errors.fix: Add loading check: if (isFetching || !data) return <MCCircularLoader fillParent />;

errors.error: Container does not handle query errors
errors.cause: Data-fetching container does not use useEffect to watch error state and display error alert
errors.detection: Container has useQuery/tRPC call but no fireCollapsibleError usage
errors.fix: Add error handling with useEffect watching error + fireCollapsibleError from useInAppAlert.

errors.error: Submit button not disabled during form submission
errors.cause: Form submit button does not have disabled={isSubmitting}, allowing double submission
errors.detection: MCButton2 with type="submit" but no disabled={isSubmitting}
errors.fix: Add disabled={isSubmitting} to the submit button: <MCButton2 variant="contained" type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>

errors.error: MCSingleTextInput used inside a Formik form
errors.cause: Using the base input component instead of the Formik-integrated wrapper inside a form
errors.detection: Regex: MCSingleTextInput within a file that also contains <Formik or <Form
errors.fix: Replace MCSingleTextInput with MCFormTextInput which provides Formik integration, label, error display, and accessibility.

errors.error: Component imported from wrong path
errors.cause: Using incorrect import path instead of the canonical importStatement from components.json
common_mistakes: Importing form shared components from individual files instead of '@msm-portal/common/component/form/shared'
Using relative paths across layer boundaries instead of alias paths
errors.fix: Use the exact importStatement from components.json for each component.

errors.error: Maximum update depth exceeded (during mock API development)
errors.cause: Mock API handler returns a new object reference on every call, causing React Query to think data changed, triggering re-render and re-fetch loop
errors.detection: Mock handler uses object literal in return statement without memoization
errors.fix: Define mock data as a constant outside the handler function, or use a ref to cache the response. Ensure the mock returns the same reference for the same input.

errors.error: Route not found / page shows blank
errors.cause: New page created but route not registered in all required locations
errors.fix: Register route in all three locations. See patterns.json -> route-registration and validation-runner.json -> routing checks.

errors.error: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'palette')
errors.cause: Component rendered outside ThemeProvider context, or accessing theme directly instead of through props in styled-components
errors.detection: Direct theme access without styled-components interpolation or useTheme hook
errors.fix: Access theme only through styled-component interpolation: ${(props) => props.theme.mcui.palette.*} or via useTheme() hook from styled-components.

errors.error: Translation key returns the key string itself instead of translated text
errors.cause: i18n namespace not loaded or wrong namespace in useTranslation call
errors.detection: UI shows 'container.order.list:title' or similar key-like strings instead of actual text
errors.fix: Ensure correct namespace: useTranslation('container.{entity}.{action}'). Verify the JSON resource file exists at src/i18n/locales/en/{namespace}.json with all required keys.

errors.error: Visual: brand color appears as wrong shade of blue
errors.cause: Using a different blue (#0070f3, #2196F3, #1976D2) instead of the MSM Portal brand blue #346bea
errors.detection: Visual inspection shows blue that does not match brand specification
errors.fix: Use theme.mcui.palette.foundation.assent which maps to #346bea. See semantic-palette.json -> quickLookup.

errors.error: Visual: error color appears as wrong shade of red
errors.cause: Using Material Design red (#f44336) or other reds instead of MSM Portal danger red #dd1f11
errors.detection: Visual inspection shows red that does not match brand specification
errors.fix: Use theme.mcui.palette.foundation.negative which maps to #dd1f11.

categories.runtime: Errors that occur when the app runs in the browser
categories.styling: Visual violations of the design system token rules

severity_levels.critical: App crashes or enters infinite loop. Must fix before any testing.
severity_levels.error: Feature does not work correctly or violates design system rules. Must fix before completion.
severity_levels.warning: Non-blocking issue that should be addressed but does not prevent functionality.
